title: A Cold Reception
content: You decide to stay silent or provide only vague details. The figure scoffs in the darkness. 'Cagey, aren't we? Or maybe you just don't have anything to tell me.'||'Vane was a professional. He deserved better than someone chasing shadows without a clue. I'm not going to do the work for you.'||'Take this drive. I won't help you open it, but I'll give you a hint: Thomas was meticulous. He always carried his most important codes with him, hidden in plain sight on his person. If you can't figure it out, you're in the wrong profession.'

choices.text: Take the drive and return to your office.
